short_description: China Compulsory Certification required
description: This product falls under "Audio & Video Equipment" (Class 08) in the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) catalog.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on Adjusting the CCC Product Catalog (2023)

short_description: China Compulsory Certification required
description: This product falls under "Information Technology Equipment" (Class 09) in the CCC catalog.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on Adjusting the CCC Product Catalog (2023)

short_description: China Compulsory Certification required
description: This product falls under "Telecommunication Terminal Equipment" (Class 16) in the CCC catalog.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on Adjusting the CCC Product Catalog (2023)

short_description: Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval required
description: This product contains a Wi-Fi and/or Bluetooth radio transmitter, which requires a Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (SRRC) before sale or use in China.
source_citation: MIIT Regulations on Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval, effective 2019.03.01

short_description: Check if encryption triggers controls
description: If this product contains embedded encryption functionality (e.g., encrypted data storage, encrypted communication), you must check if it triggers China's commercial encryption import/export controls.
source_citation: Commercial Encryption Import License List and Export Control List, effective 2021.01.01

short_description: Check Dual-Use Items Control List
description: Certain drones, cameras, and sensors with specific capabilities may fall under China's Dual-Use Items Export Control List. Please verify against the full technical specifications in the list.
source_citation: Announcement of MOFCOM, GAC, etc. on the Dual-Use Items Export Control List, effective 2024.12.01

short_description: UAV temporary export controls apply
description: Certain Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and related equipment are subject to temporary export controls. If the drone is known to be used for military purposes, export is prohibited regardless of specifications.
source_citation: MOFCOM Announcements on UAV temporary export controls (2023, 2024)

short_description: Lithium battery transport regulations apply
description: Lithium batteries shipped with this product must comply with China's dangerous goods transport regulations, including UN38.3 testing and the "One Book, One Label" requirements.
source_citation: Civil Aviation Administration of China Lithium Battery Transport Regulations

short_description: China Compulsory Certification required for power banks
description: Power banks and portable power sources fall under "Power Supply Equipment" in the CCC catalog.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: China Compulsory Certification required for home appliances
description: Smart home devices and small appliances fall under "Household and Similar Electrical Appliances" in the CCC catalog.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: CCC certification for vehicle electronics
description: Car dash cameras, vehicle GPS trackers, and in-vehicle electronics may fall under CCC certification categories for IT or AV equipment.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: CCC certification for gaming consoles and accessories
description: Gaming consoles and accessories may fall under IT equipment (Class 09) or AV equipment (Class 08) in the CCC catalog.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: CCC certification for medical devices
description: Certain home-use medical devices require CCC certification in addition to medical device registration with NMPA.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: CCC certification for projectors
description: Projectors fall under "IT Equipment" (Class 09) or "AV Equipment" (Class 08) in the CCC catalog depending on specifications.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: CCC certification for power adapters and chargers
description: Power adapters, chargers, and USB power supplies require CCC certification under the "Power Supply Equipment" category.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: CCC certification for storage devices
description: External hard drives, SSDs, and USB flash drives may require CCC certification under IT equipment rules.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: CCC certification for keyboards and peripherals
description: Computer keyboards, mice, and other input peripherals may require CCC certification under IT equipment rules.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: SRRC approval required for smart watches and wearables
description: Smart watches, fitness trackers, and wearables with Bluetooth and/or Wi-Fi require SRRC radio approval.
source_citation: MIIT Regulations on Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (2019)

short_description: SRRC approval required for smart home devices
description: Smart home devices using Wi-Fi, Zigbee, Z-Wave, Bluetooth, or other wireless protocols require SRRC radio approval.
source_citation: MIIT Regulations on Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (2019)

short_description: SRRC approval required for gaming controllers
description: Wireless gaming controllers, joysticks, and gamepads using Bluetooth or other radio protocols require SRRC approval.
source_citation: MIIT Regulations on Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (2019)

short_description: SRRC approval required for wireless peripherals
description: Wireless keyboards, mice, and other wireless computer peripherals require SRRC approval for their radio transmitters.
source_citation: MIIT Regulations on Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (2019)

short_description: NMPA registration required for medical devices
description: Medical devices imported into or sold in China must be registered with the National Medical Products Administration (NMPA). Classification (Class I, II, or III) determines the registration pathway and timeline.
source_citation: Regulations on the Supervision and Administration of Medical Devices (2021 Revision)

short_description: China Energy Label required for power adapters
description: External power supplies, adapters, and chargers must comply with China Energy Label requirements and display the energy efficiency grade on the product label.
source_citation: Administrative Measures on Energy Efficiency Labeling (2020)

short_description: Lithium battery transport regulations for power banks
description: Power banks and standalone lithium batteries are subject to additional dangerous goods transport regulations, including UN38.3 testing, and in some cases require special declaration and packaging. Restrictions apply to battery capacity and quantity per shipment.
source_citation: Announcement of MOT on Dangerous Goods Transport (2025)

short_description: CCC certification for VR/AR headsets and smart glasses
description: VR headsets, AR glasses, and smart glasses may fall under IT equipment (Class 09) or AV equipment (Class 08) in the CCC catalog, depending on product specifications and connectivity features.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: SRRC approval for VR/AR devices with wireless modules
description: VR headsets and AR glasses containing Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or other wireless communication modules require SRRC Type Approval before import or sale in China.
source_citation: MIIT Regulations on Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (2019)

short_description: CCC certification for e-cigarettes and vaping devices
description: Electronic cigarettes, vaping devices, and related electronic components are subject to special regulatory oversight in China. The electronic components and chargers may fall under CCC certification requirements. Note: China has strict import and sales regulations on e-cigarettes.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024); Tobacco Monopoly Law implementing regulations

short_description: Check Dual-Use controls for drone parts and accessories
description: Certain drone components — including high-precision gimbals, thermal/ infrared camera payloads, video transmission modules with long-range data links, and specified flight controllers — may fall under China's Dual-Use Items Export Control List or UAV temporary export controls. Please verify against the full technical specifications in the list.
source_citation: MOFCOM Announcements on Dual-Use Items Export Control List (2024) and UAV temporary export controls (2023, 2024)

short_description: Battery transport safety for e-scooters and e-bikes
description: Electric scooters, e-bikes, self-balancing hoverboards, and similar personal mobility devices with large lithium batteries are subject to strict dangerous goods transport regulations (UN3171 for battery-powered vehicles). Many are restricted or prohibited in certain transport modes due to fire risk.
source_citation: Announcement of MOT on Dangerous Goods Transport; IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations; IMDG Code

short_description: CCC certification for 3D printers
description: 3D printers classified as IT equipment or industrial machinery may require CCC certification. Certain high-end 3D printers with specific capabilities (e.g., metal additive manufacturing) may also be subject to export controls.
source_citation: Announcement of CNCA on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: SRRC approval required for two-way radios and walkie-talkies
description: Two-way radios, walkie-talkies, and other land mobile radio equipment require SRRC Type Approval in China. This applies to both professional (UHF/VHF) and consumer (PMR446/FRS) radio devices. Some frequency bands may require additional frequency allocation approval.
source_citation: MIIT Regulations on Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (2019); Radio Frequency Allocation Plan of China

short_description: The applicable VAT rebate rate can be queried by exact HS Code via the official 2026A Tax Refund Rate Library.
description: China periodically updates its Export Tax Rebate Rate Library. The currently applicable version is 2026A, released by the State Taxation Administration in March 2026. Enterprises should download this library to verify the specific rebate rate corresponding to their product's precise 10-digit HS Code. Differences in the last digits of an HS Code can result in different rebate rates. Exporters should use the official offline tax refund software or online portal, load the library, and query their HS Code to see the exact rate.
source_citation: Announcement of the State Taxation Administration on Issuing the 2026A Version of the Export Rebate Rate Library

short_description: CCC certification for solar products
description: Solar inverters and certain solar products may require CCC certification when sold in China. Grid-connected inverters fall under Class 09 (IT Equipment).
source_citation: CNCA Announcement on CCC Product Catalog (2024)

short_description: Solar products VAT refund
description: Solar panels, inverters and related products qualify for export VAT refund at the standard rate. Check current MOFCOM announcements for exact rates.
source_citation: MOFCOM Export Tax Rebate Policy (2024)

short_description: Solar product import duties
description: Solar panels and related equipment have specific import duty rates. Most solar products enjoy reduced or zero tariffs under various trade agreements.
source_citation: GAC Customs Tariff Schedule (2024)

short_description: Solar panel safety standard
description: Solar PV modules must comply with IEC 61215 (crystalline silicon) or IEC 61646 (thin-film) standards for international market access.
source_citation: IEC Standard 61215

description: RoHS Compliance for Industrial Robots
short_description: Industrial robots and robotic arms require RoHS compliance
summary: RoHS compliance required for robotic equipment
details: Industrial robots must comply with RoHS Directive (Restriction of Hazardous Substances). This includes robotic arms, controllers, and collaborative robots.

description: CE Certification for Industrial Robots
short_description: Industrial robots require CE marking for EU market
summary: CE marking required for industrial robots exported to EU
details: Industrial robots exported to EU must carry CE marking indicating compliance with EU safety standards including Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC.

description: Battery Management System Requirements
short_description: Energy storage systems require certified BMS
summary: BMS certification required for energy storage systems
details: Energy storage systems must have certified Battery Management Systems (BMS) ensuring safe operation, thermal management, and protection against overcharging/discharging.

description: UN3480 Lithium Battery Shipping
short_description: Lithium batteries require UN3480 dangerous goods documentation
summary: UN3480 documentation required for lithium battery shipments
details: Lithium-ion batteries and battery-powered energy storage systems require UN3480 dangerous goods classification and proper documentation for air and sea transport.

description: FCC Part 15 Compliance
short_description: Optical transceivers require FCC certification for US market
summary: FCC Part 15 certification required for US export
details: Optical transceiver modules exported to the US must comply with FCC Part 15 regulations for radio frequency devices.

description: Laser Radiation Warning Labels
short_description: Optical modules require laser safety labels
summary: Laser safety labels required for optical modules
details: Optical transceiver modules with laser emitters must comply with laser safety standards and display appropriate warning labels per IEC 60825.
